title: Following the Thread
description: The investigation from your last assignment revealed something troubling: the disappearances weren't random crimes, but coordinated abductions by a cult. Aldric has uncovered a lead - a cultist was spotted near Elder Moor two nights ago, performing some kind of ritual. The trail is fresh. Find their hideout, discover what they're planning, and most importantly, find out who's leading them. The Keepers need answers, and you're the one who'll get them. Quietly.

objectives.description: Investigate the ritual site near Elder Moor
Examine the ritual markings and evidence
Follow the trail to the cult's hideout
Infiltrate the hideout without raising alarm
Find and collect cult documents revealing their plans
Piece together the evidence of the larger conspiracy
Leave the hideout without being discovered
Report your findings to Aldric Vane

notes: Stealth-focused investigation quest. Hideout is cave near Elder Moor with cultist patrols. Documents reveal cult is searching for ancient artifact of dark power. Best outcome is full stealth - no kills, no detection. Getting detected puts cult on alert for future quests (harder). Killing cultists goes against Keepers' subtlety doctrine (reputation penalty). Keepers Silent Boots reward grant +1 Stealth and muffle footstep sounds. Evidence reveals cult name: The Shadowed Hand.
